clusters.title: Distance and Duration Parsing
clusters.summary: Issues with recognizing and parsing various distance formats including ranges, pluralized distances, and approximate terms such as 'ish'.

clusters.title: Session Structure Recognition
clusters.summary: Challenges with extracting sessions from descriptions that combine multiple elements, such as warm-ups, cool-downs, and various types of activities.

clusters.title: Activity Type Recognition
clusters.summary: Parser unable to recognize certain activity terms and types, such as 'Circuit Runs' and new abbreviations related to training.

clusters.title: Handling Optional and Alternative Activities
clusters.summary: Problems with handling session descriptions that include optional alternatives and multiple activities expressed by 'or' or '+' clauses.

clusters.title: Timeframes and Nutritional Guidelines
clusters.summary: Issues with recognizing training-related timeframes and nutritional guidelines as relevant inputs within session descriptions.

clusters.title: Complex Plan Formats
clusters.summary: The parser struggles with complex plan formats that include multiple parts or are presented in non-standard ways, complicating structure recognition.
